---
title: 'Biblical Counseling: Charts'
date: '2021-11-14T01:21:00.0030000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '5434380768054986897'
blogger_filename: '/2021/11/biblical-counseling-charts.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Class Assignment'
  - 'Mental Health'
---

<p></p><p></p><p></p><p></p><p></p><p></p><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"></div><p></p><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">I wanted to share two charts from a Biblical Counseling course taken in Fall 2020.&nbsp; <br /></div><p></p><p></p><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">&nbsp;</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">&nbsp;This first chart shows the different elements involved in healing a human being created in the image of God. <br /></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">&nbsp;</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">&nbsp;</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/elements-of-change-1027bde1ba08.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="720" data-original-width="960" height="358" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/elements-of-change-924239229eeb.png" width="477" /></a></div><br />&nbsp;</div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">&nbsp;</div><p></p><p>Possibly even more revolutionary, is the Spokes of Support model. Human beings are designed for community. Despite anything a modern American might say about it, we were never intended to be isolationists. We only do well, physically, emotionally, mentally, spiritually, and financially, inside healthy safe community.&nbsp;</p><p>In an individualist culture, that can be especially challenging. This chart shows that you do not have to attempt to gain community from one single source. If you have various types of communities to plug into, you can shape your community for yourself. The more wide and varied your communities are, the less likely an abrupt change to one will deeply effect your life and emotional health.&nbsp; <br /></p><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/spokes-of-community-14674618f850.png" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="317" data-original-width="569" height="330" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/spokes-of-community-4a124a89bf9e.png" width="593" /></a></div><br /><p><br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
</p><div id="mc_embed_signup">
<form action="https://darrellwolfe.us3.list-manage.com/subscribe/post?u=979cb0db6ca74343e82a059ba&amp;id=14df3ba97b" class="validate" id="mc-embedded-subscribe-form" method="post" name="mc-embedded-subscribe-form" novalidate="" target="_blank">
<div id="mc_embed_signup_scroll">
<label>Subscribe Now - Pursue a No Hiding Lifestyle</label>&nbsp;<div class="fx-relay-email-input-wrapper"><input class="email" id="mce-EMAIL" name="EMAIL" required="" style="padding-right: 30px;" type="email" value="" /><div class="fx-relay-icon" style="bottom: 0px; right: 2px; top: 0px;"><button class="fx-relay-button" id="fx-relay-button" style="height: 24px; min-width: 24px; width: 24px;" title="Generate new alias" type="button"></button></div></div><br />
<div aria-hidden="true" style="left: -5000px; position: absolute;">
<input name="b_979cb0db6ca74343e82a059ba_14df3ba97b" tabindex="-1" type="text" value="" /></div>
<div class="clear">
<input class="button" id="mc-embedded-subscribe" name="subscribe" type="submit" value="Subscribe" /></div>
</div>
</form>
</div>
<br />
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;">Shalom: Live Long and Prosper!</span><br />
<div class="MsoNormal">
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;; font-size: 18pt;">Darrell Wolfe (DG Wolfe)</span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;">Storyteller | Writer | Thinker | Consultant @&nbsp;<a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/start-here-about_12.html" target="_blank">DarrellWolfe.com</a></span><br />
<br />
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;"><a href="https://www.gallupstrengthscenter.com/" target="_blank">Clifton StrengthsFinder</a>: Intellection, Learner,&nbsp;</span><span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;">Ideation,</span><span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;">&nbsp;Achiever, Input</span><br />
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;"><a href="https://www.16personalities.com/infj-personality" target="_blank">16Personalities</a> (Myers-Briggs Type): INFJ</span><br />
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;"><br /></span>
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;"><br /></span></div>
